title: philotheca hispidula
intro: Philotheca hispidula, also known as Buxus hispidula, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Philotheca hispidula include reducing anxiety and stress, as well as providing relief from insomnia and other sleep disorders. Herbal preparations of Philotheca hispidula can be found in teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
